questionHtml: Pressure changes inside the thorax cause the movement of air in and out of the lung alveoli during ventilation. Alveolar pressure correlates to thoracic pressure. The diagram shows pressure changes in lung alveoli during ventilation in relation to normal atmospheric pressure. What causes forced movement of air out of the lungs at T?
